title: Crispy Norwegian Salmon
description: Pan-seared salmon fillets topped with a crunchy herb crumble.

ingredients.name: Fresh herbs (such as parsley, dill, chives)

instructions: 1. Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
2. Dust the fillets with flour, shaking off excess.
3. Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the salmon and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, mix the chopped herbs with crispy breadcrumbs and norwegian crumble.
5. Once the salmon is cooked, transfer it to a plate and top each fillet with the herb crumble mixture.
6. Serve immediately with a squeeze of lemon juice.
7. Garnish with additional chopped herbs if desired.
